common.forbidden: You don't have access to this page.
common.wireframeNotice: Wireframe screen — placeholder content, no live data or backend calls yet.

login.title: Log in
login.phoneSubtitle: Enter your phone number. We'll send you a one-time code — no password needed.
login.otpIncorrect: That code is incorrect or has expired. Please try again.
login.networkError: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

home.title: SHG Smart Market Linkage Platform
home.subtitle: Sprint 0 wireframes (T04) — SHG-facing screens and official dashboards, implemented as real routed pages instead of Figma.

registration.title: SHG Registration
registration.groupNameHint: Enter the name of your Self Help Group
registration.mepmaRegistrationNumberHint: Leave blank if you don't have one yet
registration.geoSuggestion: We think you're in {{district}} — is that right?
registration.geoUnavailable: Couldn't detect your location — please choose your district below.
registration.bankDetailsHint: Optional — you can add these later if you don't have them now.
registration.uploadPhotoHint: Tap to take or choose a photo
registration.successBody: An MEPMA official will review and confirm your SHG registration.
registration.queuedTitle: Saved — will sync when you're back online
registration.queuedBody: You're offline right now. Your registration is saved on this device and will be submitted automatically once you're connected again.

errors.ifscLength: IFSC code must be exactly 11 characters
errors.submitFailed: Couldn't submit your registration. Please try again.

catalogue.title: Product Catalogue
catalogue.registerFirst: Register your SHG before adding products to the catalogue.
catalogue.deleteQueued: You're offline — the delete will complete once you're back online.
catalogue.noProducts: No products yet. Tap "Add product" to list your first one.
catalogue.loadFailed: Couldn't load your catalogue. Please try again.

form.categorySuggestion: Suggested categories based on the name and description:
form.name: Product name
form.unitHint: e.g. kg, piece, jar, dozen, litre
form.queuedOffline: You're offline — these changes will sync automatically once you're back online.
form.queuedOfflineNoPhotos: You're offline — this product will be added once you're back online. You can add photos after it syncs.

errors.moqInvalid: Minimum order quantity must be a whole number of 1 or more
errors.stockInvalid: Stock must be a whole number of 0 or more
errors.submitFailed: Couldn't save this product. Please try again.

photos.title: Photos
photos.cameraUnavailable: Couldn't access the camera. You can still choose a photo from your gallery.
photos.uploadFailed: Photo upload failed. Please try again.
photos.queuedOffline: You're offline — this photo will upload automatically once you're back online.

voice.title: Voice Assistant
voice.connectFailed: Couldn't start the call. Please try again.
voice.micUnavailable: Couldn't access your microphone. Check your browser's microphone permission and try again.
voice.lowBandwidthHint: Voice calls are turned off to save data. Type your question below instead.
voice.textSendFailed: Couldn't send your message. Please try again.
voice.quickCommandsHint: Try: "What is the price of turmeric powder?", "Add my new product", or "What loans are available for my SHG?"

action.noShgRegistered: You need to register your SHG in the app before adding products.
action.genericError: Something went wrong with that request.

districtDashboard.title: District Dashboard
districtDashboard.subtitle: MEPMA district officer view — SHG performance across ULBs and mandals.

ulbDashboard.title: ULB Dashboard
ulbDashboard.subtitle: Urban Local Body officer view — SHG and product performance within the ULB.

shgDashboard.title: SHG Dashboard
shgDashboard.subtitle: Per-SHG monitoring view — membership, product mix and sales for a single group.

productDashboard.title: Product Dashboard
productDashboard.subtitle: Catalogue-wide view — category performance, pricing and inventory signals.

buyerDashboard.title: Buyer Dashboard
buyerDashboard.subtitle: Buyer engagement view — registered buyers, repeat orders and demand trends.

governmentDashboard.title: Government Dashboard
governmentDashboard.subtitle: State-level (MEPMA HQ) view across all districts — Module 7 policy & monitoring dashboard.
governmentDashboard.mapPlaceholder: Map visualisation placeholder — district heat-map lands with the mapping library in a later sprint.

admin.title: Admin overview
admin.overviewSubtitle: SHG, product and user counts for your area.

admin.actionQueuedOffline: You're offline — this change will sync automatically once you're back online.
